headline: Corpay (CPAY) Stock Draws Fresh Price Target Split As Analysts Rework Growth Views
summary: Corpay is back in focus as analysts revisit their price targets, with current reference points ranging from prior cuts of about US$7 and US$60 to fresh upside cases around US$406 and US$450. These shifts reflect a mix of renewed confidence in Corpay’s execution and capital return plans, along with lingering concerns that expectations may already be demanding. In the sections that follow, you will see how these changing targets fit into the broader valuation narrative and what to watch to keep...

headline: Is Corpay’s (CPAY) Upgraded Outlook Quietly Reframing Its B2B Payments Efficiency Narrative?
summary: In recent months, Corpay Inc. (formerly Fleetcor) reported consistent double-digit organic revenue growth and an earnings outlook upgrade, reflecting its broader focus on global B2B payments and expense management following its rebrand. This combination of stronger operating performance, higher earnings estimates, and returns above many Business Services peers has reinforced Corpay’s position as a high-return, efficiency-focused payments platform. Now, we’ll explore how Corpay’s upgraded...
